title: The AI Super PACs Trying to Influence the Midterms
description: The elections will be a test for the industry’s ability to translate money into political power.

title: Another Top General Is Out at the Pentagon
description: C. D. Donahue, the last American soldier to leave Afghanistan, is the latest in a long line of military departures.
author: Nancy A. YoussefandMissy Ryan

title: America’s Greatest Food Export
description: Ranch dressing has become, deservedly or not, a face of the nation during the World Cup.
author: Ellen Cushing

title: Is It Warm Out There?
description: The planet is getting hotter. But America’s conversation about it has chilled.
author: Joshua Partlow

title: America Desperately Needs More Sterile Screwworms
description: Ranchers are waiting for hundreds of millions of sterile flies to be produced, or for a technological breakthrough.
author: Sarah Zhang

title: Americans Are in Denial About Elder Care
description: Many assume that if they can afford paid help in older age, they won’t need to rely on kin. They’re wrong.
author: Stephanie H. Murray

title: A Fancy Name for Junk Food
description: Does the war on “ultra-processed foods” make any sense?

title: SpaceX Just Needs the Money
description: What this year of humongous IPOs says about the tech industry
author: James Surowiecki

title: America’s Big Mistake in Iran
description: Aerial bombing alone can’t win a war.

title: AtlanticTrivia: Pizza
description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.

description: He’s trying to defy the reality of a green Reflecting Pool and a lost war.

title: First the Kennedy Center, Now the Smithsonian
description: How long can the museum system’s leader, Lonnie Bunch, survive?

title: California, Seen Through the Lens of George Rose
description: George Rose, an editorial contributing photographer with Getty, has been making remarkable images of California’s people and landscapes for decades. Collected here is some of Rose’s recent photography

description: Keir Starmer joins the growing list of prime ministers who failed to address the country’s troubles.

description: Lethal injection was meant to be humane. The reality is bloody and brutal.

title: The Hot New Place for Singles

title: The Election System Wasn’t Built for This
description: The fight playing out in Maricopa County could be a harbinger of things to come.

title: Democrats’ Great Alaskan Hope
description: Mary Peltola, the Democrat most likely to win a red-state Senate seat this year, is largely unknown outside her home state. That’s not a coincidence.

title: Paradise Revisited
description: What Darwin saw in the Galápagos
